title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
summary_full: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.
summary_public: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
